posts.author: MV_12345 (MV)
posts.cookedHtml:
Starting the Jira - Monday integration and having little issues…
How can I sync that comment done in Jira is synced to Monday? or comment made in Monday (start conversation) is synced to Jira comments?

Br, MV

Ps. Do not know will I use this integration as the subtasks are not supported. We use Monday for handling HUGE projects which tasks as as subtasks in jira. So without subtasks, this does not make much sense.

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml: MV_12345, Hi we can do for it we need to descibe the scope of work and what process and workflow intergart to the jira data sync to monday and monday to sync the data on jira , that can be moveable data according to your business process and workflow automation and integrated to them

posts.author: ByronGriffin (ByronGriffin)
posts.cookedHtml:
From my experience, comments from Jira can be synced to Monday by setting up an automation in Monday.com that creates an update in a specific item when a comment is added in Jira. Similarly, you can use Jira’s automation rules to create a comment in Jira when an update is added in Monday.
Regarding your concern about subtasks, it’s true that the direct integration might not support them as you’d like. However, you might consider a workaround by using a third-party integration tool or creating a custom integration that better fits your needs. Also, since you’re handling large projects, have you thought about a Cloud Migration strategy? It could potentially offer more flexibility and scalability for your project management.

posts.author: jpmoller (JP Moller)
posts.cookedHtml: I haven’t been able to sync comments and updates between the two systems. Anyone else able to figure it out with the standard integration?
